# Md. Maherukh Islam | Systems Builder & Student Leader

Official professional dossier and systems engineering profile of Md. Maherukh Islam-a multidisciplinary student leader, developer, and systems builder based in Dhaka, Bangladesh. Specializes in web engineering, CMS modernization, database pipelines, and organizational leadership infrastructure.

- **URL**: https://maherukhislam.github.io/Portfolio/
- **Location**: Dhaka, Bangladesh (ISO Subdivision: BD-13)
- **Email**: maherukhislam2007@gmail.com
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/maherukhislam
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/in/md-maherukh-islam/

---

## Executive Summary
An engineering-focused student leader passionate about technology, systems development, organizational infrastructure, and digital modernization. Combines advanced scientific reasoning (Physics and Earth Olympiads) with structural discipline (BNCC Platoon Command) and modern web accessibility training (UNICEF Agora) to engineer practical digital infrastructure that solves real institutional problems.

---

## Core Capabilities
- **Web Engineering & CMS**: React, Next.js, HTML5, CSS3, PHP, MySQL, SQLite, custom WordPress theme engineering, Vite tooling, Vercel/GitHub Pages deployments.
- **Systems & Architecture**: Database synchronization pipelines, automated financial reporting utilities, ledger speed optimization, high-performance UI layouts.
- **Leadership & Operations**: Squad drill coordination, platoon logistics, corporate/club treasury control, capital flow oversight, and public speaking.
- **Accessibility, Cybersecurity & Compliance**: UNICEF Agora certified in WCAG 2.1 standards (Verification ID: wQE5kUfwA), APAC Cyber Hygiene certified (supported by Google.org), keyboard-navigational equity, high-contrast usability design.

---

## Key Systems Engineered

### 1. DCCNSC Official Website (dccnsc.org)
- **Role**: Lead Full-Stack Systems Architect
- **Problem**: Outdated and fractured web presence for a prominent DCC club, causing communication gaps for 1,000+ student members.
- **Solution**: Designed and deployed a unified, responsive central club portal at dccnsc.org from scratch.
- **Impact**: Integrated active directories, automated notices, unified media channels, and maintained sub-1.5s load speeds under strict server guidelines.
- **Tech Stack**: PHP, Custom CSS, MySQL, Native JavaScript.

### 2. Treasury Financial Reporting System
- **Role**: Executive Treasurer & Systems Engineer
- **Problem**: Legacy club ledgers were manual spreadsheets causing auditing latencies of up to 3 days.
- **Solution**: Engineered a local secure database sync utility and financial ledger processing interface.
- **Impact**: Reduced ledger audit time from 3 days to under 1 second (<1s) with absolute zero manual balance errors.
- **Tech Stack**: PHP, SQLite, Custom CSS, Treasury Sync Scripts.

### 3. QuantumLeap Custom WordPress Theme
- **Role**: Frontend Themes Engineer
- **Problem**: Traditional WordPress themes are bloated and perform poorly on mobile viewports.
- **Solution**: Developed a clean, high-speed theme styled purely with responsive utility grids and modern layout mechanics.
- **Impact**: Reduced standard stylesheet footprint by 80%, achieving near-perfect scores on performance checkers.
- **Tech Stack**: PHP, WordPress APIs, Semantic HTML5, Tailwind CSS.

---

## Leadership & Service Records

### 1. Cadet Lance Corporal | Bangladesh National Cadet Corps (BNCC)
- **Period**: 2024 - Present
- **Impact**: Commanded squad movements, platoon drills, physical readiness programs, and digital Platoon coordination. Promoted based on command presence, discipline, and training efficiency.

### 2. Executive Treasurer | Dhaka Commerce College Nature Study Club (DCCNSC)
- **Period**: 2024 - Present
- **Impact**: Transition of spreadsheet logs to secure database ledgers; managed cash flows, allocations, and annual operating budgets.

### 3. Environmental Executive | Earth & Nature Initiatives
- **Period**: 2024 - Present
- **Impact**: Promoted divisional ecological awareness, led youth workshops, and presented content on conservation and sustainability.

### 4. Cultural Competition Operations Volunteer | 34th Annual Cultural Competition (2025)
- **Period**: Nov 5 - 11, 2025
- **Impact**: Awarded Certificate of Appreciation by Dhaka Commerce College (Class XII, Roll S10064) for operational coordination, stage logistics, crowd control, and volunteering service.

---

## Academic Credentials & Credentials

### Dhaka Commerce College
- **Degree**: Higher Secondary Certificate (HSC) - Class XII
- **Period**: 2024 - 2026 (HSC 2026)
- **Focus**: STEM specialization track emphasizing Higher Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, and ICT.

### Secondary School Certificate
- **Degree**: SSC - Science Division
- **Completed**: 2024
- **Focus**: Advanced mathematics and logical sciences.

### Verified Accolades & Civic Forums
- **BDOC Physics Olympiad (2025)**: National Finalist, awarded Certificate of Achievement by Bangladesh Olympiad Challenge (BDOC) for conceptual and analytical excellence in competitive physics.
- **National Earth Olympiad (2025)**: Divisional Topper, selected among divisional toppers by Bangladesh Youth Environmental Initiative (BYEI) for national competition. Participation ID: 16353 (July 2025).
- **ECO Spark Challenge 1.0 (2025)**: First Place (1st Place) Winner, awarded Certificate of Excellence in Quiz Competition by Dhaka Commerce College Nature Study Club.
- **DCC Intra College CSE Fest (2025)**: Junior IT Quiz (2nd Place), held May 18-19, 2025, organized by Dhaka Commerce College Programming Society (DCCPS).
- **1st DCCSC Online Quiz (2025)**: Achievement Winner, awarded Certificate of Achievement in online quiz segment by Dhaka Commerce College Science Club.
- **Bijoy Quiz Competition (2024)**: Participation Certificate from Shahid Sergeant Zahurul Huq Hall Quiz Club, University of Dhaka, held on December 16, 2024.
- **Environment Quiz Olympiad (2024)**: Participation Certificate from Dhaka Commerce College Nature Study Club, held on November 19, 2024.
- **Web Accessibility Training (UNICEF Agora, 2024)**: Completed comprehensive WCAG inclusive web design and navigation equity training. Verification ID: wQE5kUfwA (December 26, 2024).
- **Cyber Hygiene Training (APAC Cybersecurity Fund, 2025)**: Completed training jointly organized by The Asia Foundation and SAJIDA Foundation, supported by Google.org, CyberPeace Institute, and Global Cyber Alliance (May 30, 2025).
- **Workplace Communication Essentials (UNICEF P2E Bangladesh, 2025)**: Professional readiness and leadership communication training by UNICEF Passport to Earning Bangladesh & Wadhwani Foundation (June 15, 2025).
- **Manifesto Talk - Youth, Environment & Climate (2025)**: Certificate of Participation in national youth and climate forum at Department of Environment, focusing on climate action and youth advocacy (May 31st, 2025).
